documentation.description:
This package contains routines for scanning real values for floating point
type Long_Long_Float, for use in Text_IO.Float_IO and the Value attribute.

subprograms.name: Scan_Long_Long_Float

generic_instantiations.name: Impl
generic_instantiations.code:
package Impl is new Val_Real
  (Long_Long_Float,
   System.Powten_LLF.Maxpow,
   System.Powten_LLF.Powfive'Address,
   System.Powten_LLF.Powfive_100'Address,
   System.Powten_LLF.Powfive_200'Address,
   System.Powten_LLF.Powfive_300'Address,
   System.Unsigned_Types.Long_Long_Unsigned);
